title: Gemini 2.5: Our most intelligent models are getting even better

summary: Gemini 2.5 Pro continues to be loved by developers as the best model for coding, and 2.5 Flash is getting even better with a new update. We’re bringing new capabilities to our models, including Deep Think, an experimental enhanced reasoning mode for 2.5 Pro.
summaryZh: Gemini 2.5 Pro作为最好的编码模型继续受到开发人员的喜爱， 2.5 Flash通过新的更新变得更好。我们正在为我们的模型带来新功能，包括Deep Think ，这是一种针对2.5 Pro的实验性增强推理模式。
highlights: Gemini 2.5 Pro continues to be loved by developers as the best model for coding, and 2.5 Flash is getting even better with a new update.

title: Introducing HealthBench
titleZh: HealthBench简介
summary: HealthBench is a new evaluation benchmark for AI in healthcare which evaluates models in realistic scenarios. Built with input from 250+ physicians, it aims to provide a shared standard for model performance and safety in health.
summaryZh: HealthBench是医疗保健领域人工智能的新评估基准，可在现实场景中评估模型。它以250多名医生的意见为基础，旨在为模型性能和健康安全提供共享标准。
highlights: HealthBench is a new evaluation benchmark for AI in healthcare which evaluates models in realistic scenarios.
Built with input from 250+ physicians, it aims to provide a shared standard for model performance and safety in health.
